Bloominglabs' Board Meeting

I. Called to order at 18:14

    A. Attendance: Calob, Kyle, Jimmy, Kevin, Joe, Apple, Pete

II. Old Business

    A. Digital Ocean

        1. Credits running out

        2. sent email about extension

        3. moved vaultwarden to vault.bloominglabs.org

        4. old vault is destroyed

    B. X-carve

        1. Came back

        2. Works

        3. dedicated table

        4. portable now

    C. Makevention

        1. Breaking even so far

        2. Day-of manpower

            a. any volunteers for any time periods during the day

III. New Business

    A. Machine Room organization

        1. tentative, discussion ongoing

IV. Adjourned at 18:31
